rationale.R1.2: Identifies the core argument about avoiding ensembles and bootstrap heads for deployment efficiency.
rationale.RX.1: Mentions uncertainty but doesn't quantify it for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: Covers exactly the requested dimensions of the active set.
rationale.RX.4: No explicit claims of harm avoidance, but the focus on efficiency suggests a lack of regressions.
rationale.RX.5: Doesn't provide specific provenance or traceability information.
